records.v: Business truth stays on Model 1003; no shared AST or helper model owns it.
Use schema projection when one model can fully describe the read surface.
Add granular cellwise.ui.v1 component cells when layout, composition, or mounted fragments become meaningful.
Single-model, read-only status surface driven entirely by cellwise labels.
cellwise.ui.v1 component cells compose Card/StatusBadge/StatCard/Terminal without moving truth ownership off Model 1004.
CRUD truth is remote-backed; local mode must return explicit unsupported.
通过填表组成接近 visualized HTML 的文档界面
这个页面本身就是正式 Workspace 条目。结构、顺序、布局和主要文本都由模型表里的 labels 定义。
Section、Heading、Paragraph、Callout、List 等节点分别占用独立 cell。
在 Home 修改文本标签会直接改页面内容；修改 host 的 ui_layout 会直接改布局。
ModelTable labels 先形成 cellwise 结构，再由 compiler 变成 AST，最后由 renderer 渲染成页面。
默认状态下，这个容器是 row 布局。
把 Model 1013 / (2,14,0) / ui_layout 改成 column，页面就会重新排布。
创建 app host 1013 和 truth 1014，并把 1013 挂到 Workspace 层级。
在 1013 逐个填写 ui_node_id / ui_component / ui_parent / ui_order / ui_layout。
在 1014 填写标题、段落、说明文字，再通过绑定投射到 1013 的页面节点。
Use granular cellwise.ui.v1 component cells when layout, composition, or richer display components matter.
Parent orchestrates the action contract; mounted child keeps the detailed truth.
Mounted child keeps authoritative detail and is updated only through the formal action path.
Mounted child keeps authoritative detail and is updated only through the formal action path.
Parent model owns the page asset; mounted child model owns scene truth.
在最小登录之上扩成基础聊天界面：房间列表、时间线、输入框和基础成员面板。

chosenId);ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(1020, 0, 0, 0, 'active_room_name', 'str', chosenName);ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(1020, 0, 0, 0, 'active_room_kind', 'str', chosenKind);ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(1020, 0, 0, 0, 'active_members_json', 'json', members);ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(1020, 0, 0, 0, 'active_members_summary', 'str', toMemberSummary(members));ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(1021, 0, 0, 0, 'selected_room_id', 'str', chosenId);ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(1021, 0, 0, 0, 'selected_room_kind', 'str', chosenKind);return {roomId:chosenId,roomName:chosenName,roomKind:chosenKind};};const Local UI -> Matrix -> MBR -> MQTT -> K8s Worker -> MQTT -> MBR -> Matrix -> Local UI
Timeline projection reads existing bus/debug truth. The console does not copy Matrix room state.
Send path: UI event -> bus_event_v2 -> Model 0 pin.bus.in -> pin route -> management target.
Model 1 is now rendered from cellwise labels; editing 0,0,0/title changes the title text.
Model 2 is now rendered from cellwise labels; editing 0,0,0/status changes the badge.
这是 cellwise.ui.v1 表单：字段、布局、绑定都拆成独立 label。
这是 cellwise.ui.v1 表单：字段、布局、绑定都拆成独立 label。
用 ModelTable labels 编写界面
本页本身就是 cellwise.ui.v1 页面：每段说明、示例、图表都是独立 cell，可按 label 修改。完整 Markdown 文档位于 docs/user-guide/ui_components_v2.md。

## Quick Start

A visible UI model starts with model-level labels and then adds component cells.

| label | value | purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `ui_authoring_version` | `cellwise.ui.v1` | Enable cellwise projection. |
| `ui_root_node_id` | root node id | Choose the root component. |
| `ui_component` | `Container`, `Text`, `Button` | Select the renderer component. |

Change a label, not frontend code, when you want to change text, layout, or component order.

## Layout Rule

Use visual containment labels for layout.

- `ui_parent` says which component contains this node.
- `ui_order` gives stable sibling order.
- `ui_layout` lives on the parent `Container`.
- `model.submt` is only for independent child models, not normal rows and columns.

## Base Components

| category | components |
|---|---|
| Layout | `Container`, `Card`, `Form`, `FormItem` |
| Display | `Text`, `Markdown`, `Heading`, `Paragraph`, `CodeBlock`, `MermaidDiagram` |
| Input | `Input`, `Select`, `RadioGroup`, `NumberInput`, `FileInput` |
| Action | `Button` |
| Status | `StatusBadge`, `StatCard`, `Terminal`, `ColorBox` |

## Event Flow

Formal business events must enter the current pin chain.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  UI[UI event] --> Bus[Model 0 pin.bus.in]
  Bus --> Route[pin route]
  Route --> Target[target model or MBR]
```

```json
{
  "pin": "click",
  "value_t": "modeltable",
  "value_ref": [
    { "id": 0, "p": 0, "r": 0, "c": 0, "k": "__mt_payload_kind", "t": "str", "v": "ui_event.v1" }
  ]
}
```

## Validation

Run the deterministic audit before shipping a UI model.

```bash
node scripts/tests/test_0346_ui_model_compliance_contract.mjs
```

The audit checks visible surfaces, root nodes, granular component cells, page catalog assets, raw Html usage, and parent links.
Prefer named labels such as ui_text, ui_label, ui_layout, and ui_bind_json. Use ui_props_json only for small component-specific props that do not yet have first-class labels.
